summary: Iteration 12 — (A) g:product_highlight feed emission + (B) navbar restructure (currency/theme moved to trustbar, main nav slimmed to Ask AI + Cart). Backend pytest: 29/29 passing (24 regression + 5 new for product_highlight). Origin /feed/google-products.xml emits exactly 148 <g:product_highlight> tags (37 items × 4 bullets). Each bullet is non-empty, <=150 chars, contains no HTML, no UTF-8 replacement chars. Content matches the synthesised rules: product id=1 (Office 2024 Pro Plus, apps=word,excel,powerpoint,outlook,access) emits 'Genuine Microsoft license for 1 Windows device' / 'Lifetime activation, no recurring fee' / 'Includes Word, Excel, Powerpoint, Outlook, Access' / 'Instant digital delivery by email in 15–30 minutes'. id=21 (Windows 11 Home, no apps) emits genuine+lifetime+delivery+'30-day money-back guarantee with certified expert support' and (correctly) omits the apps bullet. Antivirus product id=31 (Bitdefender Premium VPN) is correctly branded 'Genuine Bitdefender license...' — NOT 'Genuine Microsoft license...'. Iteration 10/11 regressions still hold: 5/5 aliases 200 application/xml with origin Cache-Control public,max-age=3600 and no Pragma/Expires/PHPSESSID, 37 items per feed, every <g:sale_price> still accompanied by ISO-8601 <g:sale_price_effective_date>, atom:link rel=self still echoes the requested alias, and robots.txt still lists both sitemaps under the public host. Frontend navbar restructure verified live on https://robot-rules.preview.emergentagent.com/: .trustbar contains both currency-selector and theme-toggle, the right-cluster order matches spec (trustbar-store → trustbar-age → trustbar-phone → trustbar-currency/currency-selector → theme-toggle), [data-testid=navbar-actions] has exactly 2 direct children (ask-ai-btn + cart-button), navbar-phone-cta is absent everywhere, and neither currency-selector nor theme-toggle appears inside navbar-actions. Behavioural checks all pass: clicking the .trustbar theme-toggle flips data-bs-theme light↔dark and toggles bi-moon↔bi-sun; Ask AI opens the chat widget (Addie); Cart link points to cart.php; mobile viewport (414x900) still shows data-testid=mobile-contact-strip with phone number and the navbar-toggler still expands the collapse. Theme styling is correct in both modes — dark: pill text rgb(255,255,255) on subtle white border rgba(255,255,255,0.32); light: pill text rgb(11,20,48) on rgba(15,23,42,0.14-0.28) border. ONE pre-existing minor issue surfaced (not caused by this iteration): the currency dropdown lists 4 countries (US/UK/AU/CA) not 5 — the EU row in the regions table has active=0, so all_regions() excludes it. Code is correct; data is the problem.

ui_bugs.issue: Lists only 4 countries (US/UK/AU/CA) — EU is missing because regions.active=0 for code='EU' in the MySQL seed. Code path (all_regions() in includes/regions.php) is correct; it's a DB seed issue. Fix: UPDATE regions SET active=1 WHERE code='EU'; (or re-seed). Independent of this iteration's navbar restructure — same omission would appear under the old layout.

action_items: OPTIONAL/LOW: Re-activate EU region so the currency selector lists all 5 countries spec'd in the review request. SQL: UPDATE regions SET active=1 WHERE code='EU'; (then verify the feed still has 37 items — EU products shouldn't unexpectedly start showing up in the merchant feed if EU was deliberately deactivated for inventory reasons). If EU is intentionally off, update the review-request spec to '4 country options' instead of 5.
critical_code_review_comments: _product_highlights() in merchant-feed.php is well-factored: tries admin-written description bullets first (split on • / — / – / newline / ; / · / *), falls back to a 4-bullet synthesised set if <2 usable description lines. Each bullet is <=150 chars (mb_substr safe-truncated with ellipsis). Apps bullet is suppressed when products.apps is empty or numeric. Brand string flows from _brand_from() so antivirus products get 'Genuine Bitdefender license...' instead of 'Genuine Microsoft license...'.

Trustbar utility chip styles (.trustbar-utility-btn) correctly carry both light-mode (dark text on translucent dark outline) and dark-mode (light text on translucent white outline) variants — neither variant is washed out.

Navbar slimming is structurally correct — [data-testid=navbar-actions] has exactly 2 children. No duplicate phone CTA remains in the main nav. Mobile contact strip preserved via d-lg-none, so phone access for mobile users is unaffected.

Minor improvement opportunity (not blocking): admin Edit Product description field could expose a hint that ' • ' or newline-delimited lines populate g:product_highlight, so merchants can override the synthesised defaults intentionally. Currently the parsing-first behaviour is undocumented in the UI.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_google_merchant_feed.py (appended 5 new tests under section 8: test_product_highlight_count_per_item, test_product_highlight_content_sanity, test_product_highlight_office_id1_synthesised_bullets, test_product_highlight_windows_id21_no_apps_has_guarantee, test_product_highlight_antivirus_brand_correct)

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all navbar restructure + theme/behaviour assertions pass on live preview; only EU country option missing — DB seed, not code)

seed_data_creation: None persistent. test_admin_pinned_window_overrides_rolling_for_id2 transiently writes sale_starts_at/sale_ends_at on product id=2 and unconditionally NULLs them in a finally: block.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full feed test suite is /app/backend/tests/test_google_merchant_feed.py (29 tests, ~8.6s). Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_google_merchant_feed.py --tb=short. ORIGIN URL pinned to http://localhost:3000 to bypass preview-Cloudflare's Cache-Control rewrite (documented in iter10). Navbar selectors after iter12: currency-selector + theme-toggle live inside .trustbar (NOT inside [data-testid=navbar-actions]); navbar-actions contains exactly Ask AI + Cart; navbar-phone-cta is removed entirely; mobile-contact-strip still d-lg-none in header. If next iteration re-activates EU in regions table, expect 5 country-opt-* options instead of 4.
rca of the issue: Issue: trustbar currency dropdown shows 4 options (US/UK/AU/CA) instead of the 5 spec'd by the review request (US/UK/AU/CA/EU). RCA: includes/regions.php::all_regions() executes 'SELECT * FROM regions WHERE active=1'; the EU row in the regions table currently has active=0. Code is correct; it's filtering as designed. Repro: mysql -uroot ucode_store -e "SELECT code, active FROM regions;" -> EU=0. Mitigation: UPDATE regions SET active=1 WHERE code='EU'; (and re-verify the public feed still shows 37 items — i.e. confirm whether EU products would unexpectedly enter the public-facing inventory). This is a pre-existing data/state issue, NOT a regression from this iteration's navbar/highlight code changes.
